india_trends.title: SpaceX IPO gives Elon Musk sweeping power, curbs shareholder rights
india_trends.summary: SpaceX's IPO will grant Elon Musk unprecedented executive authority through supervoting shares, mandatory arbitration, and stricter shareholder proposal rules. These policies, combined with Texas corporate law, significantly limit investor protections and challenges to management. Despite these rest

india_trends.title: RBI issues revised norms for entities dealing in forex
india_trends.summary: The Reserve Bank of India has introduced revised norms for foreign exchange dealings, ceasing the issuance of fresh licenses for money changers. The new regulations aim to streamline the authorization process for authorized persons and extend the principal-agent model for forex services.

india_trends.title: West Asia war hits motorcycle demand, specially in entry segment: Bajaj Auto
india_trends.summary: The West Asia conflict is softening demand for entry-level motorcycles in India. Bajaj Auto sees a significant slowdown from over 20 percent growth to an expected 7-9 percent. Conversely, electric scooters are gaining traction, with Bajaj Auto's Chetak sales surging. Rising fuel prices and commodity

india_trends.title: Nifty, Sensex climb 1% on US-Iran deal hopes, but investors stay cautious
india_trends.summary: Global equity markets surged on reports of a possible US-Iran agreement to end West Asia conflict, with Indian indices Nifty 50 and Sensex both rising 1.2%.&nbsp;

india_trends.title: US market today: Apollo surpasses $1 trillion in AUM, beats profit estimates
india_trends.summary: Apollo Global Management crossed $1 trillion in assets under management and beat Wall Street ​expectations for first-quarter profit on Wednesday after posting record quarterly fee-related earnings.

india_trends.title: Ahead of Market: 10 things that will decide stock market action on Thursday
india_trends.summary: Domestic equities surged as crude oil slipped below $100 and US-India trade optimism boosted sentiment. Nifty and Sensex gained over 1%, led by banking, auto and pharma stocks, while global markets also strengthened amid easing geopolitical concerns and positive momentum signals

india_trends.title: Market Trading Guide: Buy Hindustan Zinc and Vedanta on Thursday for gains up to 9%
india_trends.summary: Domestic stock markets ended with strong gains on Wednesday as oil prices slipped below the $100 a barrel mark while news of a likely trade deal between the US and India lifted sentiments.

india_trends.title: NSE says enough shareholder participation for IPO even if valuation tops ₹5 tn
india_trends.summary: Based on the current unlisted share price of NSE, which can be bought between ₹2,030 and ₹2,045 apiece, the company is valued at around ₹5.06 trillion.

india_trends.title: India, EU pitch for joint initiative to strengthen EV battery recycling
india_trends.summary: India and the European Union have launched a new initiative to recycle electric vehicle batteries. This joint effort aims to secure raw materials and promote a circular economy. A funding pool of 15.2 million euro will support advanced recycling technologies and pilot projects in India. The program

india_trends.title: Paytm Q4 Results: Co turns to black, logs profit of Rs 184 crore vs loss a year ago
india_trends.summary: Paytm Q4 Results: One 97 Communications, which operates Paytm reported a net profit of Rs 184 crore in the fourth quarter, compared with a loss of Rs 540 crore in the year-ago quarter.

india_trends.title: Paytm Q4 results: Net profit swings to ₹183 crore profit in March quarter; revenue rises 18.4%
india_trends.summary: One 97 Communications reported a consolidated net profit of ₹183 crore for the March quarter, a significant improvement from a net loss of ₹545 crore a year earlier, though it represented an 18% decline from ₹225 crore in the previous quarter.

india_trends.title: 8th central pay commission: Who is IIM Bangalore professor, EAC member and the panel's part-time member Pulak Ghosh?
india_trends.summary: 8th CPC's part-time member Pulak Ghosh is a tenured Professor of Finance, Decision Sciences and Public Policy at IIM Bangalore and a Member of the Economic Advisory Council to the Prime Minister.

india_trends.title: AMD shares jump 13% as AI chip demand lifts strong results
india_trends.summary: Shares of Advanced Micro Devices jumped sharply after the chipmaker delivered strong quarterly results and issued an upbeat outlook, driven by robust demand for AI chips. india_trends.title: Bajaj Auto announces Rs 5,633 crore share buyback via tender route, sets price at Rs 12,000 apiece
india_trends.summary: Bajaj Auto approved a Rs 5,633 crore share buyback and Rs 150 dividend alongside strong Q4 results. Profit rose 34% and revenue grew 32%, driven by higher volumes, strong exports, and improved margins, reflecting robust overall financial and operational performance

india_trends.title: India steel sector grows in April, crude output up 5.8%, consumption up 8.1%
india_trends.summary: India's steel sector showed strong growth in April 2026. Production and consumption of steel increased significantly. This performance reflects robust domestic demand and steady activity in infrastructure and manufacturing. Steel companies are investing in capacity expansion. Green steel initiatives

india_trends.title: Zee Entertainment sues Reliance-Disney over alleged music copyright breach
india_trends.summary: Zee Entertainment has sued the Reliance-Disney joint venture. Zee alleges the company used its copyrighted music without permission after license agreements ended. Zee is seeking $3 million in damages. The lawsuit highlights growing disputes over content rights in India's media market.
